THE NIPPLE IS UNREMARKABLE AND SITS WITHIN A SKIN ELLIPSE MRASURING 21 X 12.3 OM, THERE 16 A 3.5 CM IN LENGTH WELL-HEALED PERIAREOLAR SCAR EXTENDING FROM 12 TO 2 O'CLOCK. NOTE THAT AS THROUGH A10 ARE MIRROR IMAGES OP PROTOCOL SECTIONS. A1i--TWO NODES, EACH BISECTED; A12--ONE NODE BISECTED; A13--ONE NODE BISECTED; A14--ONE NODE BISECTED. SECTIONING THE BREAST REVEALS THE UPPER OUTER QUADRANT 7O-BEA ROUNDED PINK-TAN SOFT MASS WHICH I8 CENTRALLY CYSTIC, IT MEASUREQ(4 xX) 3.7 X 2.8 CM. GROSSLY, THIS ABUTS THE DEEP MARGIN. "IMMEDIATELY SUPERFICIAL TO THIS MASS IS A SECOND NODULE WITH A COIL CLIP MEASURING 3.5 X 1.2 X 1.0 CM. MEDIAL AND CENTRAL TO THE BREAST, THE SPECIMEN HAS A TAN FIBROUS BAND WHICH EXTENDS 9 CM FROM SUPERIOR TO INFERIOR AND THERE IS TAN PIBROUS TISSUE CENTRAL WITHIN THR BREAST, THIS IS SURROUNDED BY A PERIMETER OF BLAND YELLOW FATTY TISSUE.
